raw_title: Book Review: ‘Backtalker,’ by Kimberlé Williams Crenshaw
description: In her memoir “Backtalker,” Kimberlé Williams Crenshaw shows how personal trauma spurred her influential and controversial ideas about race and gender.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Successor,’ by Mikhail Fishman
description: In “The Successor,” the exiled journalist Mikhail Fishman tells the story of a charming Russian politician who might have made his country into a liberal democracy.
